TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Agent Fresh Install
Steps:
1. Take a clean machine
2. Run agent installer
3. Complete installation
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent installs successfully services start and agent registers with DS

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: DS Fresh Install
Steps:
1. Take a clean machine
2. Run DS installer
3. Complete installation
EXPECTED RESULT: DS installs successfully all services start and DS is accessible

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Agent Push Install
Steps:
1. From DS console select target machine
2. Trigger push install of agent
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent gets pushed installs silently and registers with DS

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: DS Push Install
Steps:
1. Trigger DS push install from management console to target machine
2. Monitor installation progress
EXPECTED RESULT: DS installs silently on target and services start successfully

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Proxy - Agent communication via proxy
Steps:
1. Configure proxy settings
2. Install agent
3. Check agent-DS communication
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent communicates with DS through configured proxy

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Proxy - DS communication via proxy
Steps:
1. Configure proxy on DS machine
2. Verify DS outbound calls
EXPECTED RESULT: DS communicates via proxy successfully

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Agent Install with WFA Enabled
Steps:
1. Enable WFA on server
2. Fresh install agent
3. Check agent status
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent installs detects WFA mode and operates accordingly

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Agent Install with WFA Disabled
Steps:
1. Disable WFA on server
2. Fresh install agent
3. Check agent status
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent installs and communicates normally without WFA flow

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Agent Upgrade with WFA Enabled
Steps:
1. Enable WFA
2. Upgrade agent from older version
3. Verify WFA state post-upgrade
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent upgrades successfully and WFA state is retained post-upgrade

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Agent Upgrade with WFA Disabled
Steps:
1. Disable WFA
2. Upgrade agent
3. Verify normal communication
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent upgrades with no WFA disruption

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: DS Install with WFA Enabled

2. Fresh install DS
3. Verify DS behavior

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: DS Install with WFA Disabled
Steps:
1. Disable WFA
2. Fresh install DS
3. Verify DS behavior
EXPECTED RESULT: DS installs normally and no WFA references are triggered

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: DS Upgrade with WFA Enabled
Steps:
1. Enable WFA
2. Upgrade DS
3. Verify WFA config post-upgrade
EXPECTED RESULT: DS upgrades and WFA config persists and works post-upgrade

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: DS Upgrade with WFA Disabled
Steps:
1. Disable WFA
2. Upgrade DS
3. Verify normal communication
EXPECTED RESULT: DS upgrades successfully and normal communication resumes

2. Validate signatures of listed binaries

2. Validate port entries

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: APIVersion=v1.1 in authprop

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION:
Device Moved to WFA then Re-approved when keyshareservelt
is hit again
Steps:
1. Move device to WFA
2. Approve device again from console
3. Check agent behavior post-approval
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent detects re-approval and resumes normal communication

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Device Approved Before Agent Detects WFA
Steps:
1. Move device to WFA
2. Immediately approve before agent detects WFA
3. Verify server handling
EXPECTED RESULT: Server handles early approval gracefully with no sync issue

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: keyshareServlet Called After Re-approval When Keys Exist
Steps:
1. Ensure agent is aware of WFA
2. Approve device from console
3. Verify keyshareServlet is called even if keys exist
EXPECTED RESULT: Agent sends keyshareServlet request post-approval even if keys are already present

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Agent and DS on Same Machine

EXPECTED RESULT: Both run without conflict and agent communicates with local DS correctly
